title: Project HANUMAN
description: Source: DTE Subject: Environment Context: The Government of Andhra Pradesh launched Project HANUMAN on World Wildlife Day 2026 to address the rising human–wildlife conflict in the state. About Project HANUMAN: What it is? Project HANUMAN stands for Healing and Nurturing Units for Monitoring, Aid and Nursing of Wildlife.
